channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

Why do you think about LINK all day, every day? Oh that's right, you're a link baggie too.
Kek baggie

Anon, just so you know that one of the reason I'm still holding this piece of shit LINK is you. The day you stop posting here I am selling. You give me hopium. Thanks.

62017472

I HATE ALL FREAKIN STIIIIIINKS and will forever more

62022852
bumparino :}

62022933

stinkies are coping with FOLDERS now :} the patheticness speaks for itself

62024698
fuck STIN K lol

62025843
all yhat matters is the paiiin of stiiink

62028212

62028237
just let the thread die, you faggot

62028302
You are mentally ill :}

62028494

make me
make me let it die :}
this thread is here for the truth

>>62028302
you're seethin' :}

62029960

what a loser lmao

62030842
i'll never forgive you worthless stinkoids xD

62030875

>>62015802
Yeah, I'm thinking based. Never let them live their heavy bags down, remind them about how pompous and smug they were thinking people will write books and post stories about their success.

kekbaggies

everybody hates u stupid stinks
we loathe you more than almost anything

item.title: Stocks will be sideways at best this year Gold has no reason for buying power to step in again Your best bet this year i… — 16 replies — 64.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Stocks will be sideways at best this year Gold has no reason for buying power to step in again Your best bet this year i…

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-03-27 03:44 UTC

OP

Stocks will be sideways at best this year
Gold has no reason for buying power to step in again

Your best bet this year is BTC. Prove me wrong

Early replies (first 3)

62038234
>>62038225
Stop posting CP
Also I’ve lost so much money recently it’s going to take me hopefully 5yrs again to break even.

62038243
If your best bet is BTC, then MSTR is the best bet as it's an engine that accretes more BTC continuously.

62038259
ive never seen such a young man

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62038274
>>62038259
>>62038225
This fucking meme was never funny, it's forced and I hate the fact that you fagboats are only forcing it because it makes others cringe. Fuck you.

62038286
>>62038225
He's like the youngest person that I've ever seen.

62038298
>>62038274
just say you're jealous of this vigorous young boy

62038308
>>62038274
ok unc

62038324
>>62038274
In the beginning it was a little funny. The guy thinks he looks younger then he actually looks. So everyone has to go with the joke endlessly? I agree there's a lot of fags posting that belong on reddit.

62038333
>>62038308
i love this meme. since it became popular, the amount of millennials bragging about being mistaken for much younger is down at least 80%. its hilarious

ive never seen
such
a
young
man

62038334
>>62038225
I don’t even get this meme.
This dude literally looks like in his 30s
How people say he looks 17 Lamo

62038339
>>62038274
>fagboats
what

62038345
>>62038324
he's actually doing a parody of another guy

62038346
>>62038333
I actually look 10 years younger than what i am. Sucks to suck buddy, better luck on your next life's genetic lottery

62038350
>>62038274
hes our new serena. biz loves brazilians

62038351
>>62038243

> MSTR is the best bet

MSTR will punishment for not understanding BTC.

62038355
>>62038346
based

item.title: Who’s buying BTC at the dip? — 34 replies — 46.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Who’s buying BTC at the dip?

Open thread • Replies: 34 • Updated: 2026-03-27 03:11 UTC

OP

Dip incoming, time to stack or wait it out?
Share your moves, bags, or strategies. Let’s see who’s taking advantage of the dip.

Early replies (first 3)

62025264
>>62025259
Might wait another couple of months...

62025266
>>62025264
Try a year.

62025274
>>62025264
Like how many months?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62025378
>>62025266
Let's see if you're right

62025418
>>62025259
Just wait for the next dump. This weekend or next Trump will threaten Iran on Friday night or Saturday and TACO before market open on Monday.

62026385
>>62025292
October bottom?
How sure??

62026568
>>62025259
Just started buying a small amount weekly

62027601
>>62025418
but Iran isn't afraid tho. Gotta prepare for what's comin

62027610
BTCISTERS WHY CAN'T WE BREAK THROUGH 70K???

62029592
>>62026568
Small amount like how much?

62029892
>>62027610
Wait for 200k

62029902
>>62026568
nice nice

62030098
>>62027610
Stop crying like a baby

62031274
>>62027610
Embrace the bear. So long as shit keeps shifting along that 1% margin, my living expenses are covered.

62031290
>>62025259
Buy orders set at $40K.
See you on October.

62031293
>>62025259
I'm buying now. I'll buy more when it dips. If it dips.

62031296
If we hit the 50s I'm going to load up so hard.

62031778
>>62029892
Thats possible. Anything can happen bro

62031831
chomo coin aint going back up blud

62033377
>>62030098
That's funny

62033836
>>62025259
I'm buying.
Time in the market better than timing the market I always say.

62033874
>>62031290
Let’s see how low BTC goes this year. Still stacking and staking mine on Babylon. Better than just letting it sit.

62034106
>>62033836
Buy more
>>62033874
hold is the best option

62034113
>>62034106
I think staking somewhere is just another shit

62034130
>>62031831
Whats chomo coin

62034516
>>62034106
Holding is fine, but why not earn on it now that native staking exists? Think about it, anon.

62034519
>>62031274
Well, depends on you anon

62034531
>>62034113
Sounds like you mean centralized platforms. This isn’t just some random place to stake, it’s designed differently, maintaining our control.

62035042
>>62025418
You can never catch the bottom, just DCA and stake on a good BTCFI that keeps BTC Native

62035048
>>62034519
It only makes sense to hold right now if you don't have time to play the game. But it doesn't take much effort to set buy orders at 69k, sell orders at 70/71k, and watch the money roll in. It's easy money right now.

62036008
>BTC
I bought DOGE at the dip. It's gonna moon this time for sure.

62036354
>>62031293
You're doing the right move ser

62038277
>>62035042
That’s what I’m doing as well, anon. I wonder why they haven’t realized this approach yet. But it’s not too late anyway.

item.title: Dont do meth + trade boys — 61 replies — 44.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Dont do meth + trade boys

Open thread • Replies: 61 • Updated: 2026-03-27 02:33 UTC

OP

Last year october, while I was eating meth all day everyday i decided to put 500k (my entire lfiesavings) all on ETH.. I am now down to about 200k and its not looking great.

Learn from me gentlemen. I am now genuinely considering those switzerland assisted euthanasia pods if things dont go up soon

Early replies (first 3)

62024576
>>62024567
yikes

62024595
Just don't become an addict. Alcohol, drugs... I was an alcoholic for 10 years and it ruined my life.

Funny thing, I became an alcoholic for being a wagie. I got the night shift because the salary is good and became unable to sleep. I just couldn't sleep. Started drinking to sleep. Then one day I threatened my boss (alcohol rage). Now, I'm not a wagie and I'm not an alcoholic. I'm nothing.

62024602
>>62024567
>eating meth all day everyday
the fuck? I do the same, 90% racemic p2p based methamphetamine hydrochloride

5-25mg a day. im dying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62026933
>>62025379
goddamn nigga

status report????

62026942
>>62026933
IM STILL AWAKKE AHHAHYAHAHAHAHA

62026946
METROBOOMIN we fucking work on this bro we aint stopping until we stopping and we stoppin when want to stopp

62027041
>>62026933
alright listen I dont HEAR voices in my head, but I get FEELINGS and my FEELINGS are telling me you feel guilty because yes this thread made me do this impromptu extended ENDUUURANCE binge and. I wanna tell you dont fuckking feel guilty bro you are fine, listen listen to this if you wanna feel better because this is how I feel right now. I feel great: https://youtu.be/6-8E4Nirh9s

I'm gonna crash maybe 6-8 hours, I have to because there's a part of my mind that know it's not okay to be awake for 2.5 days straight. I think I slept on sunday right?

62027049
>>62027041
I slept on saturday?

62027058
>>62026933
THE FUCK I responded to this guy 1 min after and HE still HASNT RESPONDED, FED RIGHT. FUCKING knew it damnit. wait no im wrong please XuxTjBS9 if you're a federal AGENT just lmk.

FBI = Friendly Bean Inspector

62027062
theres something wrong with me man im sorry >>62026933

you soundcool and I remember everything I just, im not myself

62027078
>>62024567
you had enough money to buy a house in cash. what you are retarded?

62029411
>>62027062
statust report

did u take more?

62029441
>>62029411
i crashed man, i feel alright but man it's honestly funny looking at my posts here lol. I actually went nuts, im gonna chill out for a bit but my brain keeps telling me I should get back to work. the fucking meth use justifies it and it just feeds itself over and over.

honestly I was truly built to be self-employed but man I.... I really should take a break. I havent even properly caught up on my sleep. I appreciate you being patient with me though, I actually accused you of being a fed lmao.

62029444
>>62029411
>did u take more?
right to answer your question no, I went to my bed to "rest my eyes" and slept. like that weird amphetamine sleep where you feel awake and asleep at the same time and get rest at the same time, its so fucking weird.

62029447
>>62029411
i'd show you my stash but this is a blue board lmao. they're nice and clear.

62029634
>>62024567
I am about sick and tired of your bullshit Gordon.
Stop cooking and make the fucking third game you piece of shit.

62029643
>>62029634
I just checked, and not a single half life reference ITT before mine? all of /biz/ are fucking esptein jews sucking each others dicks.

fuck this board.

62029671
>>62027078
>you had enough money to buy a house in cash. what you are retarded?
Everyone on biz knows the worst thing to do with money is buy a house, no! Gamble it in the jewish casino and lose 60% like this homeless retard did.
Let the goyim deal in the real world.

62029686
Crush and rub it on your gums whats the worse that can happen

62033249
>>62024602
>>62024639
damn these doses are tiny compared to mine, is my gear just trash? I've gotten from 3 different plugs 100s of kms away from each other too, and all my gear passes the bleach test with flying colors (instantly moves all over the place on contact).

I've tried 20-50mg in a capsule, but it didn't start feeling good until like 60-80mg+
I don't even binge, I take one oral dose for a 12hr chemsex session, and then take a 2 week break, because I don't want to build any tolerance.
Last time I did 120mg in a single cap and only then did I feel it hit hard.

Pic related stash

62033277
>>62024666
Jesus christ what even is /biz/ about anymore kek

62033280
>>62024956
>>62033249
The only reason I keep increasing my dosage is because I'm looking for a high I experienced once and then never again

I used to only do ecstasy, but one time I think I got a meth bomb. It wasn't a gradual comeup to a lovey-dovey roll, it went from 0 to 100 with the most insane rush ever, nothing has ever felt that good in my life ever before and ever since.

I've since hunted for that feeling, no MDMA press or cap ever came close since. I've done 4mmc, meth, even combos like meth+molly+GHB, none of those even come close to 10% of how good that one press felt. And I take huge breaks to make sure it's not a tolerance issue (2 week breaks for meth and mephedrone, 2-3 month break for molly)

I've actually nearly given up on finding it and just enjoy these other drugs, which just don't really compare imo but what can I do. I just settle for these now since I found a girl who is willing to roll with me once every 2 weeks for a long ass chemsex session.

Also, this isn't a stim fueled essay, I'm sober lol, my last session was over a week ago, been sober since, next one coming up soon

62033290
>>62024567
>switzerland euthanasia pods
oh ok so its a jew writing this thread so that white people are reminded about being sold suicide

62033391
>>62024567
what's the bull case? like, why will the value of the coin go up? just because you hope so? this is probably one of the worst times in the history of crypto to invest in shitcoins based on what's happening economically right now.

62033492
>Down to 200k
I would legitimately be retired if I had that much money, my break-even is around 60k if I work for a month a year on odd jobs.
Kind of weird looking back and seeing that I could be retired now at 27 if I just stuck with my last job for 2 more years and invested it all.

62034164
>>62033492
how can u retire with 200k lmao

62034249
>>62034164
>>62034164
That's enough if I was alone.
The FIRE safe withdrawal rate is 4% (although my main non-crypto investment has been doing 6-8% annually since 2018).

4% of 200k is 8000, which is 666 usd per month.
Just retire to a 3rd world country.
I used to rent a tiny 20sqm studio here for like 100 usd per month, and I would eat at street food places like pic related for $1 to $1.50 per meal Ate twice a day, paid $20 monthly for internet, just played or watched series movies and anime on my phone all day.

And ice here is like $25 to $35 a gram.
I actually lived that lifestyle for like 3 years, it was okay.

62034517
>>62034164
>Live with family
>No car no buy
That simple, I basically have to scrape together a couple hundred a month and I'm good.
And yes I can do it forever and never get kicked out.
I picked 200,000 because the official number is 150k if we factor in an average stock market growth, but I wanted a little cushion. In reality I'm gonna be doing some part-time work on the side so I wouldn't even be touching said most time, I don't really consider picking fruit at my uncle's farm for a couple hours "work."

My monthly expenses are probably 600 dollars or less.
>>62034249
Yeah I could go overseas too but I just live with family and basically have this life already.
It's actually crazy how cheap living is when you don't have a car or house payment, like I only work now to stack up money for future-proofing stuff. The cost is similar to having 3 roommates in a low cost of living area.

62034533
>>62034249
nigga my idea of retirement isnt living in a 3rd world country like the rest of you animals


i want a fucking bugatti, a 3 story house with 5 bedrooms and importantly, in a first world country with fast internet

jesus you people are pathetic


>i want to retire at 27 so i can live like a poorfag in thailand

62034841
>>62034533
>i want a fucking bugatti, a 3 story house with 5 bedrooms and importantly, in a first world country with fast internet
>jesus you people are patheti
ngmi

62035727
>>62034533
>you people are pathetic
Says the guy down to 200k to the person who is actually retired from the 2018 bullrun
>bugatti, a 3 story house with 5 bedrooms
What for? I live right in the city, everything is walking distance. I have hired help that comes over to clean when I want them to, my laundry gets picked up and delivered to me, I don't need many rooms or a car, everything is walking distance.
Even several asian massage parlors are walking distance, I can get head or full service from hot asian girls while high, all within my budget
>fast internet
I can stream 4k, what else do you need?

>live like a poorfag
Hell nah.
I was just saying how you can make 200k work.
But personally I barely spend like $40k a year even though I can afford much more, and already live like a king compared to the locals here. Back when I was more of a stoner I was stoned 24/7 and it doesn't even make a dent in my budget.

62038112
>>62035727
>just retire so you can live impoverished in a 3rd world nation

man shut the fuck up

62038131
>>62024612
if youre taking xanax and accepting the shitty side effects (impaired math and decision making ability) just to balance out the stimulants, youre rapidly approaching rock bottom. voices should have been your sign. get off the drugs. memantine can block the effects of stimulants and make them less euphoric if you want to disincentivize yourself

item.title: MUSK DUMPING SPACEX — 13 replies — 39.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
MUSK DUMPING SPACEX

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-27 03:35 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62036080
>>62036036
Seems pretty normal actually.

62036118
>>62036080
Why would this shit come out at the start of a bear market or at least a bearish period in the market?

62036167
>>62036036
Putin gona born all the satellites and production plants

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62036188
>>62036118
Because it was probably decided on 6 months ago.

62036785
So when is the best time to invest after IPO release in general? 6-8 months? so that the VCs can sell off without me losing value in my position?

62036991
>>62036785
Just be a spacex employee 15 years ago and get stock that way :)

62037004
>>62036829
10/10 doodle

62037176
>>62036036
I consider buying. Don't care if it crashes, gotta support Elon.

62038019
me waiting till Putin sell papers backed by Ukraine land

62038255
>>62036118
i hope the s&p is down 20% the middle east is on fire and oil is 150+ a barrel when this goes live

62038271
there is not only economic crisis
its the crisis of trust

62038341
Don't care. Still buying.

item.title: So. What are some jobs that pay pretty well, is in demand now / soon and aren't completely clogged yet? IT and tech is o… — 8 replies — 17.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
So. What are some jobs that pay pretty well, is in demand now / soon and aren't completely clogged yet? IT and tech is o…

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-03-27 03:26 UTC

OP

So.
What are some jobs that pay pretty well, is in demand now / soon and aren't completely clogged yet?
IT and tech is obviously done and dusted, and apparently blue collar stuff is soon-to-be as genz are flocking to it as last resort.

Early replies (first 3)

62037841
>>62037816
Befriend a wealthy billionaire and win him over into letting you manage his money. Let the dumb retards worry about getting a job in the real world.

62038056
>>62037816
Anything in healthcare, as a man you'll be considered "diverse" kek

62038105
>>62037816
All jobs are completely clogged. Quite literally at this point you need to just keep your expenses to nothing and save 40-50% of your income to survive.

>>62038056
Don’t do this. You are a decade too late.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62038175
>>62038105
>>62038056
doctor but for geriatrics. Boomers have all the money.

62038200
>>62038105
You're retarded. It's the only major industry that has inelastic demand and can't be outsourced. Hospitals are still reeling from the great resignation 5 years ago and schools aren't pumping out enough graduates. People are only getting older and sicker.

62038304
>>62038175
You aren’t going to be a doctor anytime in the next 10 years unless you start today.

Between medical school, residency and boards you are looking at a ten year time investment to start making money and then you are going to be struggling for another 10-15 years in billing hell.

>>62038200
Can almost guarantee that there will be less demand for medical personnel as the boomers start dying. The peak for medical care is either already there or will be reached in the next year or so. The GLP-1 effect is already going to kill demand and once you start seeing the boomer die off the need for medical staff will start going down. Just spend years of your life to make mediocre wages though, I’m sure you will totally not regret missing the boat a whole decade after it pulled out of port.

62038309
>>62037816
Chef

62038320
>>62038309
Private chef*

item.title: >if the stocks and commodities would just crash the monies would all flow back into crypto *breathes in* AHAHAHAHAHAHAHA… — 13 replies — 14.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
>if the stocks and commodities would just crash the monies would all flow back into crypto *breathes in* AHAHAHAHAHAHAHA…

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-27 03:00 UTC

OP

>if the stocks and commodities would just crash the monies would all flow back into crypto
*breathes in*
AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAH, AHAHAH, HA HA HA HA

Early replies (first 3)

62036347
who told you that? btc is basically s&p500 by now

62036389
>>62036338
>sell crapto to cover losses in the boomer shitbag market

62036459
>still hovering around the 68-70k range
Literally nothing happened you mean.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62036470
>>62036459
>best possible scenario for crypto
>dumps
lmao @ u

62036491
>>62036470
>dumps
Not sure you're responding to who you think you are friendo.

62036700
You are skimming those 1% margins, right anon?

62036745
>>62036491
hey don't worry bud, the halvening isn't priced in yet :))

62036958
>>62036338
I don't get it. why people don't see we are about to get biggest deflation in almost 20 years.

62036976
>>62036700
when it dips I buy
when it recovers I sell
ez money

62037257
>>62036958
In october. You just gonna sot on your hands until then?

62037553
>>62036347
yep sorry cryptobros, your asset is entirely tied to movement of SPX

62038107
>>62036958
The major banks, asset fund managers, and hedge diversified into crypto during 2022-2024.

Lots of clueless anons were cheering that on because it meant massive up wards price, and people though that it may lead to mass adoption.

All it really did was attach btc to stock price movements, since these major asset holders tend to bundle all their assets together as collateral.

62038223
>>62037553
>>62038107
It's literally been sat in the 70k range, fluctuating up and down 3% since January while stocks have been all over the place.
People seriously come out with the wildest shit possible to get anons to drop their bags early before option expiry day.

item.title: Question for lawyers of /biz/ — 13 replies — 14.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Question for lawyers of /biz/

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-03-27 03:00 UTC

OP

I’m a 1L student at a top 30 law school in the country, I was in the top 33% for my first semester GPA and I’ve applied to over 70 summer internships but I’ve gotten absolutely nothing. Am I screwed? I have heard getting a summer internship is insanely important but it’s almost April and I’ve only had a few interviews that petered out. I assumed this would be so much easier once I got my grades back but it’s impossible.

Early replies (first 3)

62035513
you’re a while male aren’t you

all I can say is good luck

62035520
needed top 20%

62035569
>>62035502
>I’m a 1L student at a top 30 law school in the...
NO ONE CARES NIGGER.
IF YOU DONT HAVE YUAN AS YOUR MAIN CURRENCY ON YOUR BROKER YOU ARE ALREADY LOST FILTH GOYIM

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62035609
>>62035502
Lawfag reporting. You need to do something; you will be cooked if you don’t have anything on your resume for 1L summer.

Given that you are flexing your school’s ranking and grades, I would bet you are applying mostly for Big Law internships. Those are reserved gay black women these days so you are barking up the wrong tree. Reach out to local small or midsize firms in your area. You should also talk to your career center. In the worst case scenario, apply for a judicial externship as those are pretty easy to get. But yeah, you have to find something.

62036453
>>62035569
I was just thinking this morning about allocating to yuan as hedge against usd.

62036818
>>62035502
Take a bath while wearing your clothes like Hiruguma

62038073
I'm going to take the LSAT next month. What do you guys make of the whole "AI will replace lawyers" thing? Sometimes I worry that getting an entry level gig will be impossible by the time I would graduate.

62038121
>>62038073
>>62035502
Reporting

Honestly I pity you guys. It's rough. Most entry level jobs and lawyer salaries generally don't justify the cost of law school imo. Many people will be stuck in defense (liability/accidents, malpractice, etc) and barely paying bills and loans.

anyone with family or friend ties to a good gig will be alright.

I hated the billing side of defense. Plaintiff side is better; less stress, and makes more money (it keeps up with inflation better). If u get stuck doing defense, eye on switching sides eventually and use that experience. Unless you somehow land a huge defense client and you are the rainmaker supplying the billing.

Criminal sucks but some good prosecutors end up at larger plaintiff firms. Same with AGs. Really really huge plaintiff cases are false claims act/pharmaceutical whistle-blowers. That's what some AGs/deputy AGs target.

If ur like me and have to fend for yourself, good luck.

62038132
>>62035502
Aye LMAO you're hosed. You should have gone t10 at least. You're fugged

62038136
>>62038121
I do foreclosure mainly now, which spills over into bankruptcy. Very high volume but no billing. 90% of foreclosures are uncontested (death, divorce, etc.) so no I don't feel bad about it. Many of the remaining contested matters are squatters too, which spills over into eviction.

I'm doing alright but I worked for it. Not killing it but im working on it. Good luck.

62038180
>>62038073
Good question re AI. They have some good AI resources but I don't think the legal field will ever allow AI to count as actual legal advice (duh!) Support staff is fucked tho.

Good lawyers have a very high verbal IQ. Well above average and well above current AI. There's no replicating it currently imo. Plus, AI has a tendency to hallucinate case citations and other things. That's malpractice.

Some big legal data firms have good AI. But nothing so far compares to actual good lawyers.

62038196
I dunno I dropped out in 2020.

62038222
>>62038073
AI will not replace lawyers. But, AI will replace mediocre/shitty lawyers.

Takeaway: if you cannot get into a top 100 (top 50?) law school, the debt is probably not worth it. If you can get a full ride somewhere, then go for it.

item.title: Are houses still a good investment in the US? — 3 replies — 12.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Are houses still a good investment in the US?

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-03-27 03:51 UTC

OP

Are houses still a good investment in the US?

Early replies (first 3)

62038366
not unless you will live within 1 days travel of that house without using a car or plane

62038370
>>62038366
I would be living in the house. This is a rent for cheaper and invest the extra VS buy a house to live in for more money discussion

62038372
>>62038362
For me it was, I just bought a house and sold my condo. But I love in a major city

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: What's the US bond yield where it'll all crash? — 4 replies — 4.1/hr

What's the US bond yield where it'll all crash?

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-03-27 02:56 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62035095
Won't happen. Mass bond dumping is the economic nuclear option, and there is a similar MAD game theory aspect to it.

62035173
guh...

62035440
>>62035076
30 year over 5 / 10 year over 4.5 is the taco trigger

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62038205
the day biden froze russian treasuries the fuse was lit i was hoping they would be able to pull some crazy miracle of tokenizing everything especially since fink has been shilling it so hard unfortunately lawmakers live off banker cum and going to bend US over and watch them rape US in the ass

item.title: How long until markets price in US defeat? — 5 replies — 2.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
How long until markets price in US defeat?

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-03-27 02:00 UTC

OP

How long until markets realize we are going to lose the Iran war and will be beholden to irans war demands? How much lower?

Early replies (first 3)

62036805
there was no war m8 just a routine military ops with overtime pay

62036857
the first ground operations are maybe this weekend, and the offense will look successful at first, but the strait will remain closed because the US will not be able to stop drones being launched over the mountains from hundreds of miles away. so however that realization sets in, that boats will still not pass when the military is literally right there, should cause rapid repricing

62037203
They're trying to price it into oil and the US is literally just manipulating the short term futures.
In the short term they can't price it in. In the long term doing this shit wrecks the curve by elevating the longer term futures for ages. That's when it'll get priced in when we're months into this shit and futures literally can't go back down.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62038014
>>62036565
>>62036857
>lose the Iran war
Thirdies may not like it, but the US is 6 million years ahead in military tech. The US military & government holds the keys to the meaning of life & death, has both friendly & evil alien helpers (ET/FNORD), psychic "remote viewing" spie's, time travel tech, fleets of reverse-engineered antigravity alien tech "TR-3B Black Triangle" flying ship's powered by element 115, communication with ghosts the afterlife & the unborn, triple-barreled M551A666 PsychoSheridan tank's, 75th Rangers exoskeleton-hip-fired gyro-stabilised 120mm infantry mortar's with pinpoint accuracy during 25mph sprint, access to other "parallel" universe's, NSA/DARPA GGGQEP quantum ∞(±6^∀)Petahertz miconpossessors to eavesdrop on every single electronic & non-electronic communication in the world even sign language underneath 1km of EMF Kevlar, "Rods from God" (just 1 orbital tungsten telephone pole = two Czar Bombas), the 300,000-strong "Fighting Molemen" U.S. SUBTERRANEAN FORCE, FT LEE VA (the secret "7th branch" existing since 1899), quantum IFVs, "phase-shifting" Armored Recovery Vehicles, new "Stealth" tech that makes jet's invisible to Radar. Shoulder-fired ASAT missiles. Stealth field kitchens. This is publicized in Stargate SG1, scientific research publication Popular Science, only a fraction of the more spooky & shadowy stuff not listed above is merely hinted at in Marvel Cinematic Universe™, history documentary Red Alert 2, French time travel documentary Life is Strange (David Madsen was a rogue DIA test subject), but the pardoned parcel is the US of A is at least 6 million years ahead in military tech even without the help of alien's. It is 6 million years ahead though the exact number fluctuates due to the activities of the US Military Time Travel Program underneath Barksdale AFB, L.A., this 6 million years ahead is a universally agreed-upon average by the world & intergalactic/ET scientific communities.

62038038
>>62036565
Maybe governments shouldn't have been shitting on bonds in favor of the ponzi market. Maybe Line should go Down.

item.title: ½ Trillion Gone — 55 replies — 81.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
½ Trillion Gone

Open thread • Replies: 55 • Updated: 2026-03-27 03:14 UTC

OP

The US stock market wiped out $500 Billion dollars today. You did sell all your goyboxes, didn't you anon?

Early replies (first 3)

62036869
Haha, just kidding. It was actually a $1 Trillion dollars.

62036893
i bought the dip
panicans lose
TTP

62036894
unless you're a day trader none of this matters and even if you're a day trader still none of this matters you will lose your money regardless. fud doesn't work on proper investment strategies. longing the market won game over bye bye pink wojaks farming crypto queer

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62037060
>>62037040
most of us don't spend all our time on a one year chart. what you don't want a big sale? weird philosophy you have there.

62037067
>>62037060
no you don't understand the world is ending this time fr dump everything into crypto b4 it's too late

62037077
>>62036853
Crypto is crabbing and the only etf I buy is VT so I don’t really care

62037096
betting against this is the definition of mental illness

62037100
Can someone please give me an idea of when this bullshit will be done and over with?

62037131
>>62036893
Betting that a war 30+ years in the planning is going to stop halfway, from a nation who sees it as an existential problem that can only be solved now is pretty dumb.

62037151
Already swapped to bonds as soon as the inside nibbas exited back in october.

62037154
>>62036906
Kamala isn’t going to have sex with you, incel.

62037293
>>62036969
unfortunately, there are some dumps on that graph which you really don't want to fall into unless you were only planning to hand your portfolio over to your children anyway

62037311
>>62036893
Israel and Iran have their own opinions on if the war can continue.
Trump can't cuck out without their assent.

62037318
>>62036969
>1980 to 2000 was peak human civilization
Yeah I'd believe it

62037324
>>62036969
That's good news for the immortal among us here.

62037377
>>62036853
>price goes down $0.01
>SEVENTY HUNDRED BAZILLION DOLALRY DOOS WAS DELOOTED FROM DA MARKAT!
the stupidity is oh so tiresome.

62037382
>>62037377
it's the same people who want to tax unrealized gains

62037404
>>62036908
Lucky you.

62037409
>>62036935
Damn gold still up 2% ytd. I should buy more of it but I've become completely detached from all my holds.

62037465
>>62037377
It's concerning from a tax receipts perspective when your government's military and entitlement spending are 104% of receipts and $40 trillion in debt. Perhaps it is that equity movement is just noise but if the bond market breaks this little hiccup will be seen as an appetizer to the screaming. From a political perspective someone who makes the markets being strong his only feature and continues to destabilize them through retarded decisions is similarly concerning but it will cull the weak and a lot of entities caught in the crossfire. Indians are sliming each other out over gas right now, you don't realize how bad it's going to get. Even if we stopped today it could be too late. Democrats are salivating as if their ascension could do anything to alleviate the horrors. Mo money fo dem programs does not a balanced budget make. If one is secure in his employment he could do quite well but that's predicated upon all the ones that aren't getting fucked and consumed by the dying empire. It'll be hell but finally the bottom can fall out, the useless and unlucky cast aside, chuds will reign just by having access to food and shelter. The idea of 100k 1/4 ton trucks dies since no ones wages are meaningfully going up. The management class and bean counters get decimated. Today is not nothing, as a single event it would be negligible but as a part of the larger picture it's the embodiment of everything getting worse following blind optimism.

62037470
>>62037465
Americans have infinite money

62037482
>minis 1%
can't even care, wake me up with a real crash of 12-15+%

62037501
perhaps today was not the best day to try to get into trading methinks

62037510
You can always tell the /pol/faggots apart because they think that even the worst market downturn in history is some kind of spiral that will never end. They're unironically the same kind of faggots that get hyped up when a hurricane comes in and keep spamming about it when it's already gone hoping the death toll will rise. Total fucking losers lol

62037531
Whoever made this trade is probably dead now with a bullet in the head.

62037566
>>62036853
>DJIA dropped 1%
>S&P 500 dropped 1.7%
>Nasdaq-100 dropped 2.4%
OMG it's a fucking nothingburger! However can the West survive an event of this insignificance!

62037573
>>62037465
>It's concerning from a tax receipts perspective
Only if you're Dutch. Americans don't have a tax on unrealized capital gains.

62037605
>>62037510
Japanese women are so pleased with themselves!
They saved the japanese stock market with their female japanese asian women tendencies and birthrates and JAV appearances.
The yen was saved.
The japanese race is saved!

62037625
>>62037470
Its actually kind of crazy how many people don't realize this and keep acting like we should try to bring our wars in under budget. The money is infinite. It always has been infinite, it always will be infinite. There is enough money to drop a six million dollar missile on top of every individual brown person on the planet, it makes absolutely no difference.

62037699
>>62036969
Even though that chart is calculated “without inflation” it’s still affected by it.
In that there’s still a gravitational pull from scared fiat looking to park itself. So participation still increases in absolute terms.

62037786
>>62036853
I voted for this

62037819
>>62037501
It’s unironically a great day. Investing is the opposite of traffic lights. Buy red. Hold green. Sell calls and puts for premiums when it crabs. It’s really that simple. Theres going to be a lot of money made on shipping, weapons, and oil for anyone with a brain. If the market trends down invest in coffee. Its a really undersold defensive because white bitches no matter how broke will never give up their Starslops.

62038287
>>62037625
Your fucking retarded, America has crumbling infrastructure, no real manufacturing base, gutted educational standards, no major sources of economic growth accounting for inflation and a decimated middle.

The 8+ trillion plus dollars and other resources we spent on the middle east forever wars, could have easily propelled America into a global economic behemoth that dwarfs China and the rest of planet if it was well invested.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 182 replies — 39.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 182 • Updated: 2026-03-26 23:16 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62032416
My point is. Sure, people have issues and suffer and hey... That's part of life and it helps us grow. People are asleep, yes and you can help them wake up, yes. Everything is an illusion but when you're in a dream, even though everything is an illusion you still feel like it's real, right?

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d-rwxY4WePI “If Everything Is an Illusion… Why Care at All? | Adi Shankaracharya’s Dangerous Answer”
Help the dreamers and you'll change the dream

62032418
>>62032404
How could one not notice? If you lack awareness then what is one even doing?

What does reality mean to you?

62032462
>>62032418
>What does reality mean to you?
Why would it have to mean everything? Reality just IS, just like I'm just trying to BE. The only meaning is the one we make ourselves.

>How could one not notice?
If one is asleep and not trying to wake up then one does not notice. The mind only shows you what you can handle. If you can't handle it. If your coping skills are too low, then you'll stay asleep forever and that's fine. It is how it is and it'll change when people are ready to wake up.

>If you lack awareness then what is one even doing?
Well... The people with no awareness keep doing false work, right? They do what they believe is important because they believe it is what some people call the "ultimate reality" or "Brahman" or "Neti neti" or "Atman" or "The divine" or "The fourth" or "The transcendental" or "Turiya" or "Self". People have this inner longing, they're always trying to go towards the thing that they believe is the MOST. And most people think that having everything is everything. The thing is that they confuse having everything with becoming everything. It's like, people are trying to get to enlightenment but enlightenment can not be achieved. It's literally the opposite of achievement. Silence is what's left over after all the false work of the ego stops. Once you stop the false work you become silent and that silence is enlightenment. So what people who lack awareness are doing is the false work of the ego. If you dissolve your ego then you stop doing that and you're left with joy, peace, contentment and bliss. The only thing we need is to notice. If you notice then the negativity stops and the positivity gets amplified, that's how you know what's "good" and what's "bad". If you look at it and it goes away then it's bad. If you look at it and it grows then it's "good".

62032477
>>62032418

"Until they become conscious they will never rebel, and until after they have rebelled they cannot become conscious." - George Orwell, 1984.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NOntxdDykio OSHO: Be a Misfit - Never Compromise!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OGM7VFeLRyQ OSHO: Risk Everything for Awareness

Just risk everything for awareness but never risk awareness for anything

62032667
>>62032379
>Call me crazy which would be ironic considering the topic
The thing is. Your mind produced this sentence. And it's trying to label it as "crazy". Why? One of the many traps of the mind is that it insists that doing the thing that will kill it is useless. The mind always tries to convince your "This won't work" because the mind does not want to change. The mind wants to stay the same because let's think about it. How does changing your mind actually look like? It's literally your neurons re-arranging. That's hard right? It's far harder than your mind staying static and not changing since then no neurons need to re-arrange. Also, if you change you lose parts of yourself therefore that's called an identity crisis, which is scary once it starts happening. Another thing is that when your neurons re-arrange it feels like what? What is the subjective feeling of you changing? It's called confusion. If you're a 100% convinced of something the your mind is like steel. If you're confused as fuck then that means you're changing and it's also called cognitive flexibility

https://www.youtube.com/shorts/rpZWvusIC60 OSHO: Are Contradictions Part of What You Are Saying?
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wn0WTKer7Wc OSHO: Contradictions a Creative Doorway

You'll find silence in confusion because confusion is cognitive flexibility and you want to adapt to anything that IS therefore you'll JUST BE. Stop believing in stuff. Stop living your life based on belief. Belief is memory and memory is a false path. You only need to BE in THIS MOMENT. And you can only be if you're confused. If you KNOW then you're not flexible and therefore you are not just BEING. JUST BE. Change yourself and with that change the world

62032676
>>62032379
>Call me crazy which would be ironic considering the topic
Your mind wants to keep on minding. It doesn't want to stop minding. Therefore it'll try to protect itself from the things that will inevitably kill it if you continue onward. It's just the nature of the mind and the only thing you need to do is NOTICE. To notice is to be aware and to be aware means to wake up from the sleep

62032694
>>62032418
Another trap of the mind is that you have control. Just you thinking "I have control over the mind" is one level 1. Level 2 is "My mind has control over me". Just you noticing that you are NOT in control is moving further, not backwards. Took me literally years to realize that I don't control it, it controls me. The biggest lie the devil has ever sold is that it doesn't exist. The biggest lie the mind has ever sold is that YOU'RE in control. If you believe that then think again and while you think about it just OBSERVE your mind. Just look at what your mind is telling you. How it'll try to convince you "No anon, you're the one in control. You're the master". Watch out, the mind is tricky tricky. It'll play all sorts of tricks and you'll always be convinced that it's not. The mind always wants to keep on minding, that's what it wants. You becoming silent is what kills it and it does not want that. And that's why everyone is asleep and has a hard time waking up. Because their mind wants to keep on minding and not be woken up. Because waking up means the mind dies.

62032922
100$ end of bull run. Gavin is the biggest Web3 pedo grooming gang leader in the industry. He's the connecting point for everyone else. Why do you think that DOT has native interoperability? It's because his nickname in the cheese pizza community is "The connector". He kidnaps desperate little girls, 17 and under, from Ukraine and sells them into decentralized slavery. Let's just say that everyone in the industry shares them. It's a decentralized industry after all. Epstein island looks like a paradise compared to the Web3 pedo conventions Gavin has been organizing. Imagine 9 inch BBC destroying 12yo Ukrainian cheese pizza while Gavin is watching and eating Jerky (I hope you guys know what Jerky stands for). It's all according to plan. DOT is actually THE coin for cheese pizza. It is a vital part in buying and selling of cheese pizza and jerky. It is the central focal point of the grooming rape gang that Gavin is spearheading. We are the ultimate elite underground society. We control even the jews, for the jews buy cheese pizza and jerky from us and Gavin has a whole collection of pictures and video evidence of the cheese pizza / jerky parties. At any moment he will use all of this evidence and blackmail Israel and the jews into buying DOT therefore catapulting it to 100$+. We're going to make is soo hard. Gavin is our leader and he'll make sure our poor Indian villages are all feed.

May Vishnu of the Pedochain be with you

Best regards
Rajakish Punjabi Kumar

62032929
>>62032462
>>62032477
>>62032667
>>62032676
>>62032694

All well and good. Themind can be a hindrance and be your most powerful ally,however you are missing a key element here. Its what you learn,consume, previous post about social media and letting others influence you. The mind doesn't need to be the enemy. Its what you put into it, who you associate with. Its always in development or.....destruction

62032935
>>62032922
You are one wild dude

62032967
>>62032929
>The mind doesn't need to be the enemy
I never said it is. If the mind is your enemy then it'll fight against you. You'll never win the fight against your own mind. What you repress will grow stronger. My whole point is to observe it in a non-judgmental way. If you do that it'll start to collapse in on itself. Just by observing your mind, just by noticing it's movement it'll start to stop moving. If you're fighting it then you're interacting it. If you interact you feed the movement. Ok, let's try and experiment. Sit on your chair, start watching your mind and when a thought comes up start to FIGHT IT AS HARD AS YOU CAN. Go full force at it, try to silence is as best as you can. Do that for like 15min and your head will start to hurt and the thought will keep coming back louder and louder. Don't believe me? Good, try it yourself. Don't believe anything but the experience itself.
The nature of the mind is so that it can only do multiplications and additions. You can't substract and divide. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. MONKEY BREATHING FIRE. Let me guess? You're thinking about a monkey breathing fire, right? Funny how that works, right? You'd never thought about it if I didn't point it out, right?

>Themind can be a hindrance and be your most powerful ally
That's a though produced by your mind. It tries to make you believe it's your ally in order to keep on minding. It's neither your ally or your enemy. It just doesn't want to die and therefore it'll trick you into believing all sorts of things. Ask yourself this "Is my mind tricking me?" and then OBSERVE your mind and see what it does and how it tries to trick you. Just try. I'm not saying I'm right or wrong. Get the experience yourself.

62032974
>>62032929
>>62032967
>If you do that it'll start to collapse in on itself
This takes time and consistent effort. It doesn't JUST happen... And I'm not saying to believe my bullshit. You try it yourself and then you come to your own conclusions. DYOR. See what happens. Weird shit is going to start happening.

62032992
>>62032922
>imagine my fetish
no thanks

62033000
>>62032992
Fetish? We're talking about a pizza party with some side dish of freshly harvested young jerky.

62033138
wtf is this trash thread, it reads like a random schizos blog

62034039
>>62033138
Must be true if you say so

62034101
>>62033138
Or wait. Let's try this. Might be an interesting conversation. How so? What have I done or said to make you believe that?

62034381
7,5$ top in 2028
+400% from ATL

62034423
>>62032967
This exercise is very elementary.

>And not saying to believe my Bullshit
Do you live in a bubble purposely living in blissful ignorance to the outside world so you can be content?

62034490
>>62034423
>Do you live in a bubble purposely living in blissful ignorance to the outside world so you can be content?
How so? What makes you think that?

62034856
>>62034423
>This exercise is very elementary.
So, what you're saying is that it's easy to do and therefore it's appropriate? And that it gets the point across and makes the person doing the experiment have the necessary experience in order to become aware of how the mind works? That's great!

62034890
>>62034490
Reread your posts
>>62034856
Maybe for a few. Better than none I guess

62034963
>>62034890
Right... So your point is?

62035196
>>62034381
grim

62035839
>>62034963
I didn't have one

62036344
>>62035839
Ok. So, ... You wanna talk about anything? Anything on your mind?

You said
>Maybe for a few. Better than none I guess
What would you like to know about the mind, if anything? If you don't think the exercise is appropriate then it's because you already understand, right? And if you tell me what you don't understand then we can start moving in that direction, right? Or don't tell me. It's up to you

62037187
>>62034101
>178 replies
>105 pbtid

oh I dunno

62037296
>>62037187
Gavin is paying me to keep the thread alive. This is how we live in Mumbai my good sir. We shill coins while talking about the mind.

62037323
>>62037187
I need rupees to worship the Vishnu on the blockchain my good sar. And to feed my village of Mumbai, the city of DOT.

62037509
>>62037296
>>62037323

Post hand

62036974

62037015

62037023

62037115

62037122

62037155

62037168

62037185

62037222
>>62036974

62037263
>>62037222

62037268

62037272

62037430

62037519

62037632

62037808

62038113
>>62036590

>not gay btw
